activities.name: batch_load_DIM_MKTNG_SUB_SOURCE_MAPPING
activities.description: Loads LP data which is not exists in DIM MKTNG SUB SOURCE table

source.sqlReaderQuery:
select src.* from 
(
select 
ss.Division,
sg.LeadSourceGroupID,
s.LeadSourceID,
ss.LeadSubSourceID,
sg.SourceGroup,
ss.SourceCode,
ss.LeadSubSource,
ss.Active,
ss.EntryDate,
null as TX_Channel,
null as TX_SourceGroup,
null as TX_SourceCode,
null as ACU_AccountCode,
null as ACU_MarketingAccountID,
null as ACU_MarketingAccount,
'UNMAP' as MappingInd,
getdate() as CreatedTS,
getdate() as LastUpdatedTS,
NULL as LP_SourceGroup,------new fields added to capture the updated LP values
Null as LP_SourceCode, 
Null as LP_Subsource,
Null as AgencyFee,
Null as AgencyVendorName,
Null as ACU_AgencyVendorId
from 
( select 
a.division,
a.leadsubsourceid,
a.leadsourceid,
a.sourcecode,
a.leadsubsource,
a.active,
max(b.entrydate) as entrydate
	from edw.dim_lead_sub_source a
	join edw.fact_lead b on a.leadsubsourceid = b.leadsubsourceid
	group by  a.division,
			  a.leadsubsourceid,
			  a.leadsourceid,
			  a.sourcecode,
			  a.leadsubsource,
			  a.active) ss
			left join edw.dim_lead_source s on s.leadsourceid=ss.leadsourceid
			left join edw.dim_lead_source_group sg on s.sourcegroupid=sg.leadsourcegroupid
			where entrydate>='2022-01-01'
			) src	left join [edw].[dim_mktng_sub_source_mapping]  sm 
			on src.division=sm.division and src.leadsubsourceid=sm.leadsubsourceid
where sm.division is null and sm.leadsubsourceid is null

activities.name: Mapping by Level2 Keywords Match
activities.description: Mapping the unmapped sub sources using Level2 keywords

scripts.text:
--------------------------------------------------------Level2 Keywords Match

With LVL2_1 AS 
(
	SELECT Distinct
	Division,
	LeadSubsourceID,
	SourceGroup,
	SourceCode,
	TX_SourceCode,
	CASE 
		WHEN SourceCode LIKE '%Home Work%'    THEN 'Agents Referral'
		WHEN SourceCode LIKE '%Ron %'        THEN 'Broadcast TV'
		WHEN SourceCode LIKE '%Canvas%'    AND ( LeadSubSource NOT LIKE '%JB Canvas%' AND Leadsubsource NOT LIKE '%DP Canvass%') THEN 'Canvass'
		WHEN SourceCode LIKE '%Show %'    OR SourceCode LIKE '%Shows %' OR SourceCode LIKE '% Show'    OR SourceCode LIKE '% Shows' OR SourceCode LIKE 'Shows' OR SourceCode LIKE 'Show'    THEN 'Events'
		WHEN SourceCode LIKE '%Event%'        THEN 'Events'
		WHEN Division='RTW' AND SourceGroup LIKE '%Event Marketing%'  THEN 'Events'  -- Level 1 Match
		WHEN SourceCode LIKE 'Liner%'        THEN 'Manufacturer'
		WHEN SourceCode LIKE '%Out of Home%'THEN 'Out of Home'
		WHEN SourceCode LIKE '%PPC%'        THEN 'Paid Search'
		WHEN SourceCode LIKE '%BJs%'        THEN 'Retail'
		WHEN SourceCode LIKE '%Costco%'        THEN 'Retail'
		WHEN SourceCode LIKE '%Home Depot%'    THEN 'Retail'
		WHEN Division='SWR' AND SourceGroup LIKE '%Home Depot%'  	THEN 'Retail'  -- Level 1 Match
		WHEN Division='RTW' AND SourceCode 	LIKE '%Double Pop%'  	THEN 'Employee Referral'
		WHEN Division='RTW' AND SourceCode 	LIKE '%Reload%'  		THEN 'Employee Referral'
		WHEN Division='MAC' AND SourceCode 	LIKE '%Self-Gen%'  		THEN 'Employee Referral'
		WHEN SourceCode LIKE '%Mall%'        THEN 'Retail'
		WHEN SourceCode LIKE '%Wallmart%'    THEN 'Retail'
		WHEN SourceCode LIKE '%Sam%'        THEN 'Retail'
		WHEN SourceCode LIKE '%Store%'        THEN 'Retail'
		WHEN SourceCode LIKE '%Valpak%'        THEN 'Shared Mail'
		WHEN SourceCode LIKE '%Kohler%'        THEN 'Manufacturer'
		WHEN SourceCode LIKE '%RemoPro%'	THEN 'Agents Referral'
		WHEN LeadSubSource LIKE '%Leads.IO%' or LeadSubSource like '%Guru Digital%' or LeadSubSource like '%Social Blue%' or LeadSubSource like '%Keyword Connect%' THEN 'Branded Partner' --- Level 3 Match for All Div
		WHEN SourceCode LIKE '%Leads.IO%' or SourceCode like '%Social Blue%' or SourceCode like '%Keyword Connect%' THEN 'Branded Partner' 
		ELSE NULL END AS CAL_SourceCode
	FROM [EDW].[DIM_MKTNG_SUB_SOURCE_MAPPING] Where MappingInd='UNMAP' and SourceCode<>'0' and SourceCode is not null
	AND Division!='CTA'
)
Update [EDW].[DIM_MKTNG_SUB_SOURCE_MAPPING] set 
       TX_Channel				= RF.TX_Channel
       ,TX_Sourcegroup			= RF.TX_Sourcegroup
       ,TX_SourceCode			= RF.TX_SourceCode
	   ,ACU_AccountCode         = RF.ACU_AccountCode
	   ,ACU_MarketingAccountID  = RF.ACU_MarketingAccountID
	   ,ACU_MarketingAccount    = RF.ACU_MarketingAccount
       ,MappingInd				= (CASE WHEN (T1.TX_SourceCode IS NOT NULL AND ( T1.TX_Channel != RF.TX_Channel OR T1.TX_Sourcegroup != RF.TX_Sourcegroup OR T1.TX_SourceCode != RF.TX_SourceCode)) THEN 'REMAP' ELSE 'MAP' END)
       ,LastUpdatedTS			= Getdate()
	   from [EDW].[DIM_MKTNG_SUB_SOURCE_MAPPING] T1
			Join  LVL2_1 T2  on T1.Division=T2.Division and T1.LeadSubSourceID=T2.LeadSubSourceID
			Join (SELECT DISTINCT TX_SOURCEGROUP,TX_SOURCECODE,TX_CHANNEL,ACU_AccountCode,ACU_MarketingAccountID,ACU_MarketingAccount FROM RDM.REF_MKTNG_SOURCE_GROUP) RF on T2.CAL_Sourcecode= RF.TX_SourceCode 
	  Where   T1.MappingInd='UNMAP' and T1.Division=T2.Division and T1.LeadSubSourceID=T2.LeadSubSourceID 
	  and T2.CAL_SourceCode is not NULL   ;
	  
	  
	  
	  
---*************    Closet America  **********************



With LVL2_2 AS 
(
	SELECT Distinct
	Division,
	LeadSubsourceID,
	SourceGroup,
	SourceCode,
	TX_SourceCode,
	CASE 
		WHEN SourceCode LIKE '%Radio%'    		THEN 'Broadcast Radio'
		WHEN SourceCode LIKE '%Canvas%'    AND ( LeadSubSource NOT LIKE '%JB Canvas%' AND Leadsubsource NOT LIKE '%DP Canvass%') THEN 'Canvass'
		WHEN SourceCode LIKE '%Cust Referral%'    	THEN 'Consumer Referral'
		WHEN SourceCode LIKE '%Direct Mail%'    	THEN 'Direct Mail'
		WHEN SourceCode LIKE '%Directories%'    	THEN 'Directories'
		WHEN SourceCode LIKE '%Email%'    			THEN 'Email'
		WHEN SourceCode LIKE '%Emp Referral%'    	THEN 'Employee Referral'
		WHEN SourceCode LIKE '%Event%' OR SourceCode LIKE '%Events%' OR SourceCode LIKE '%Home Show%'  OR SourceCode LIKE '%Show or Event%'  OR SourceCode LIKE '%Showroom%' THEN 'Events'
		
		WHEN SourceCode LIKE '%Manufacturer%'    	THEN 'Manufacturer'
		WHEN SourceCode LIKE '%Native%'    			THEN 'Native'
		WHEN SourceCode LIKE '%Newspaper%' OR SourceCode LIKE '%Print%'   THEN 'Newspapers/Magazines'
		WHEN SourceCode LIKE '%Out of Home%'    THEN 'Out of Home'
		WHEN SourceCode LIKE '%Paid Search%' AND UPPER(LeadSubSource) NOT LIKE '%YOUTUBE%'  THEN 'Paid Search'
		WHEN SourceCode LIKE '%Paid Social%'    THEN 'Paid Social'
		WHEN SourceCode LIKE '%Rehash%'    THEN 'Consumer Referral'
		WHEN SourceCode LIKE '%SelfGen%'     	THEN 'Employee Referral'
		WHEN SourceCode LIKE '%Shared Mail%'    THEN 'Shared Mail'
		WHEN SourceCode LIKE '%Sign%'    		THEN 'Out of Home'
		WHEN SourceCode LIKE '%Social%'    		THEN 'Paid Social'
		WHEN SourceCode LIKE '%Native%'    		THEN 'Native'
		WHEN SourceCode LIKE '%Television%'    			THEN 'Broadcast TV'
		WHEN SourceCode LIKE '%website%'    			THEN 'Paid Search'
		WHEN SourceCode LIKE '%Yellow Pages%'    		THEN 'Directories'
		WHEN SourceCode LIKE '%Branded Digital%'    		THEN 'Branded Partner'
		WHEN SourceCode LIKE '%Organic/SEO%'    		THEN 'Organic/SEO'
		WHEN SourceCode LIKE '%Prev Customer%'    		THEN 'Consumer Referral'
		WHEN LeadSubSource LIKE '%Leads.IO%' or LeadSubSource like '%Social Blue%' or LeadSubSource like '%Guru Digital%' or LeadSubSource like '%Keyword Connect%' THEN 'Branded Partner' --- Level 3 Match for All Div
		WHEN SourceCode LIKE '%Leads.IO%' or SourceCode like '%Social Blue%' or SourceCode like '%Keyword Connect%' THEN 'Branded Partner' 
		ELSE NULL END AS CAL_SourceCode
	FROM [EDW].[DIM_MKTNG_SUB_SOURCE_MAPPING] Where MappingInd='UNMAP' and SourceCode<>'0' and SourceCode is not null
	AND Division='CTA'
)
Update [EDW].[DIM_MKTNG_SUB_SOURCE_MAPPING] set 
       TX_Channel				= RF.TX_Channel
       ,TX_Sourcegroup			= RF.TX_Sourcegroup
       ,TX_SourceCode			= RF.TX_SourceCode
	   ,ACU_AccountCode         = RF.ACU_AccountCode
	   ,ACU_MarketingAccountID  = RF.ACU_MarketingAccountID
	   ,ACU_MarketingAccount    = RF.ACU_MarketingAccount
       ,MappingInd				= (CASE WHEN (T1.TX_SourceCode IS NOT NULL AND ( T1.TX_Channel != RF.TX_Channel OR T1.TX_Sourcegroup != RF.TX_Sourcegroup OR T1.TX_SourceCode != RF.TX_SourceCode)) THEN 'REMAP' ELSE 'MAP' END)
       ,LastUpdatedTS			= Getdate()
	   from [EDW].[DIM_MKTNG_SUB_SOURCE_MAPPING] T1
			Join  LVL2_2 T2  on T1.Division=T2.Division and T1.LeadSubSourceID=T2.LeadSubSourceID
			Join (SELECT DISTINCT TX_SOURCEGROUP,TX_SOURCECODE,TX_CHANNEL,ACU_AccountCode,ACU_MarketingAccountID,ACU_MarketingAccount FROM RDM.REF_MKTNG_SOURCE_GROUP) RF on T2.CAL_Sourcecode= RF.TX_SourceCode 
	  Where   T1.MappingInd='UNMAP' and T1.Division=T2.Division and T1.LeadSubSourceID=T2.LeadSubSourceID 
	  and T2.CAL_SourceCode is not NULL   ;

activities.name: Mapping by one-one without div match
activities.description:
Mapping the unmapped sub sources using
one to one without division matches

scripts.text:
----------------------------------------------Without Division (Level1 and Level2 Direct Match)


With WD_1 AS
(
	SELECT 	SourceGroup,SourceCode,Count(1) AS Count
	FROM
	(
		SELECT 
			DISTINCT
			SourceGroup,
			COALESCE(SourceCode,'NA') AS SourceCode,
			TX_SourceGroup,
			TX_SourceCode 
			FROM
			RDM.REF_MKTNG_SOURCE_GROUP
			) M1
	GROUP BY SourceGroup,SourceCode
	HAVING Count(1)=1
),
WD_2 AS
(
	SELECT 
		DISTINCT 
		COALESCE(A.SourceGroup,'NA') AS SourceGroup, 
		COALESCE(A.SourceCode,'NA') AS SourceCode,
		B.TX_SourceGroup,
		B.TX_SourceCode,
		B.TX_Channel,
		B.ACU_AccountCode,
		B.ACU_MarketingAccountID ,
		B.ACU_MarketingAccount   
		FROM WD_1 A
		JOIN RDM.REF_MKTNG_SOURCE_GROUP B 
		ON COALESCE(A.SourceGroup,'NA') = COALESCE(B.SourceGroup,'NA')
		AND COALESCE(A.SourceCode,'NA') = COALESCE(B.SourceCode,'NA')
)

Update [EDW].[DIM_MKTNG_SUB_SOURCE_MAPPING] set 
TX_Channel					= RF.TX_Channel
,TX_Sourcegroup				= RF.TX_Sourcegroup
,TX_SourceCode				= RF.TX_SourceCode
,ACU_AccountCode			= RF.ACU_AccountCode
,ACU_MarketingAccountID		= RF.ACU_MarketingAccountID
,ACU_MarketingAccount		= RF.ACU_MarketingAccount
,MappingInd					= (CASE WHEN (SM.TX_SourceCode IS NOT NULL AND ( SM.TX_Channel != RF.TX_Channel OR SM.TX_Sourcegroup != RF.TX_Sourcegroup OR SM.TX_SourceCode != RF.TX_SourceCode)) THEN 'REMAP' ELSE 'MAP' END)
,LastUpdatedTS				= Getdate()
from [EDW].[DIM_MKTNG_SUB_SOURCE_MAPPING] SM 
Join WD_2 RF on 
 (SM.Sourcegroup= RF.Sourcegroup or SM.Sourcegroup= RF.TX_Sourcegroup )
and (SM.Sourcecode= RF.SourceCode or  SM.Sourcecode= RF.TX_SourceCode)
where  SM.MappingInd='UNMAP'  ;

activities.name: Mapping by Level3 fuzzy Match
activities.description:
Mapping the unmapped sub sources using
level3 fuzzy matches

scripts.text:
--------------------------------------------------------Level3 Keywords Match

------------------------------------------------------------------------FHI

WITH T_FHI AS
(
SELECT 
	Division,
    LeadSubSourceID,
    SourceGroup,
    SourceCode,
    LeadSubSource,
    TX_SourceCode,
    CASE 
		WHEN ( UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%RADIO%' 	OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '% FM' OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '% FM %' OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE 'FM %' OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%-FM %' OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '% FM-%'
													OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '% AM' OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '% AM %' OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE 'AM %' OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%-AM %' OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '% AM-%'
													OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE 'iHeart%' 
													OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%ESPN%'
													)	AND UPPER(LeadSubSource) NOT LIKE '%NEWS%' AND UPPER(LeadSubSource) NOT LIKE '%TOUR%'  THEN 'Broadcast Radio'
		
		WHEN (UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%TV%' OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%TELEVISION%' 
													OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE 'PROMEDIA%'
													OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%RSR%'	
													OR (UPPER(SourceCode) LIKE '%RON SHERMAN%')
													
													) AND UPPER(LeadSubSource) NOT LIKE '%BCI-WIT%' THEN 'Broadcast TV'
		
		WHEN (	UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%DIRECT MAIL%' OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%MAILER%' OR  UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE  '%MAY - BATH%')
									AND (UPPER(LeadSubSource) NOT LIKE '%VELPAK%' AND UPPER(LeadSubSource) NOT LIKE '%VEL PAK%' AND UPPER(LeadSubSource)  NOT LIKE '%DIRECT MAIL - RENUITY%') THEN 'Direct Mail'
        
		
		WHEN UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%FACEBOOK%'
						OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%META%'
						OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%PINTEREST%' THEN 'Paid Social'
						
						
        WHEN UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%YELP%' THEN 'Directories'
		
		WHEN UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%YOUTUBE%' THEN 'YouTube' 
		
        WHEN (UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%GOOGLE%' 
						--OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%YOUTUBE%' 
						OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%YAHOO%' 
						OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%PPC%' 
						OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%PERFORMANCE MAX%' 
						OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%PAID SEARCH%'
						OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%BING – RENUITY%'
						
						) 
						AND (UPPER(LeadSubSource) NOT LIKE '%ORGANIC%' AND UPPER(LeadSubSource) NOT LIKE '%LOCAL%' AND UPPER(LeadSubSource) NOT LIKE '%TV%'  ) THEN 'Paid Search'
						
						
        WHEN (UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%ORGANIC%' OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%SEO%' ) AND UPPER(LeadSubSource) NOT LIKE '%CUSTOMER REFERRAL%' THEN 'Organic/SEO'
		
		WHEN UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%EMAIL%' AND UPPER(LeadSubSource) NOT LIKE '%CONQUEST%' AND UPPER(LeadSubSource) NOT LIKE '%ADAPTIVE%' THEN 'Email'
		
        WHEN ( (UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%GANNETT%' AND SourceGroup LIKE '%Print%') OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%NEWSPAPER%' OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%MAGAZINE%' OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%JOURNAL%' ) THEN 'Newspapers/Magazines'
		
		WHEN UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%VALPAK%' OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%VAL PAK%' 
												  OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%REDPLUM%' 
												  OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%RSVP%'
												  OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%REDPLUM%'
												  THEN 'Shared Mail'
												  
		WHEN UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%NATIVE ADS%'  THEN 'Native'
		
		WHEN UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%MALL%' 
					OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE 'SAM%'  
					OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%HOME DEPOT%'
					OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%BRANDSMART%'
					OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%IME- BJs%'
					THEN 'Retail'
					
		WHEN UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%CANVAS%' AND (UPPER(LeadSubSource) NOT LIKE '%JB CANVAS%' AND UPPER(LeadSubSource) NOT LIKE '%DP CANVASS%')  THEN 'Canvass'
		
		WHEN UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%WALK-IN%'  OR (UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%CUSTOMER REFERRAL%' AND UPPER(LeadSubSource) NOT LIKE '%ORGANIC%') THEN 'Consumer Referral'
		
		WHEN UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%LAVIN MEDIA%' OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%SOCIAL BLUE%'   THEN 'Branded Partner'
		
		WHEN UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%YARD%' THEN 'Out of Home'

		WHEN UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%DP Canvass%' THEN 'Agents Referral'
		
        ELSE NULL 
    END AS CAL_SourceCode 
from [EDW].[DIM_MKTNG_SUB_SOURCE_MAPPING] 
WHERE Division = 'FHI' and MappingInd='UNMAP' 
)
Update [EDW].[DIM_MKTNG_SUB_SOURCE_MAPPING] set 
       TX_Channel        		= RF.TX_Channel
       ,TX_Sourcegroup   		= RF.TX_Sourcegroup
       ,TX_SourceCode    		= RF.TX_SourceCode
	   ,ACU_AccountCode         = RF.ACU_AccountCode
	   ,ACU_MarketingAccountID  = RF.ACU_MarketingAccountID
	   ,ACU_MarketingAccount    = RF.ACU_MarketingAccount
       ,MappingInd       		= (CASE WHEN (T.TX_SourceCode IS NOT NULL AND ( T.TX_Channel != RF.TX_Channel OR T.TX_Sourcegroup != RF.TX_Sourcegroup OR T.TX_SourceCode != RF.TX_SourceCode)) THEN 'REMAP_FUZZ' ELSE 'MAP_FUZZ' END)
       ,LastUpdatedTS    		= Getdate()
from [EDW].[DIM_MKTNG_SUB_SOURCE_MAPPING] T
Join T_FHI SM  on T.Division=SM.Division and T.LeadSubSourceID=SM.LeadSubSourceID
Left Join (SELECT DISTINCT TX_SOURCEGROUP,TX_SOURCECODE,TX_CHANNEL,ACU_AccountCode,ACU_MarketingAccountID,ACU_MarketingAccount FROM RDM.REF_MKTNG_SOURCE_GROUP)  RF on SM.CAL_Sourcecode= RF.TX_SourceCode
Where T.Division = 'FHI' and  T.MappingInd='UNMAP' and  T.LeadSubSourceID=SM.LeadSubSourceID and SM.CAL_SourceCode is not NULL ;

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------HSI

WITH T_HSI AS 
(

SELECT 
	Division,
    LeadSubSourceID,
    SourceGroup,
    SourceCode,
    LeadSubSource,
    TX_SourceCode,
    CASE 
		WHEN ( UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%RADIO%' 	OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '% FM' OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '% FM %' OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE 'FM %' OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%-FM %' OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '% FM-%'
													OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '% AM' OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '% AM %' OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE 'AM %' OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%-AM %' OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '% AM-%'
													OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE 'iHeart%' 
													OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%ESPN%'
													)	AND UPPER(LeadSubSource) NOT LIKE '%NEWS%' AND UPPER(LeadSubSource) NOT LIKE '%TOUR%' THEN 'Broadcast Radio'
		
		WHEN (UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE 'TV' OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '% TV' OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '% TV %' OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE 'TV %' OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%TELEVISION%' 
													OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE 'PROMEDIA%'
													OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%RSR%'	
													OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%WKMG%'
													) AND UPPER(LeadSubSource) NOT LIKE '%BCI-WIT%' THEN 'Broadcast TV'
		
		WHEN (	UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%DIRECT MAIL%' OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%MAILER%' OR  UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE  '%MAY - BATH%')
									AND (UPPER(LeadSubSource) NOT LIKE '%VELPAK%' AND UPPER(LeadSubSource) NOT LIKE '%VEL PAK%' AND UPPER(LeadSubSource)  NOT LIKE '%DIRECT MAIL - RENUITY%') THEN 'Direct Mail'
        
		
		WHEN UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%FACEBOOK%' 
						OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%META%'
						OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%PINTEREST%' THEN 'Paid Social'
						
						
        WHEN UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%YELP%' THEN 'Directories'
		
		WHEN UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%YOUTUBE%' THEN 'YouTube' 
		
        WHEN (UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%GOOGLE%' 
						--OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%YOUTUBE%' 
						OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%YAHOO%' 
						OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%PPC%' 
						OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%PERFORMANCE MAX%' 
						OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%PAID SEARCH%'						
						OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%BING – RENUITY%'
						) 
						AND (UPPER(LeadSubSource) NOT LIKE '%ORGANIC%' AND UPPER(LeadSubSource) NOT LIKE '%LOCAL%' AND UPPER(LeadSubSource) NOT LIKE '%TV%'  ) THEN 'Paid Search'
						
						
        WHEN (UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%ORGANIC%' OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%SEO%' )  AND UPPER(LeadSubSource) NOT LIKE '%CUSTOMER REFERRAL%' THEN 'Organic/SEO'
		
		WHEN UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%EMAIL%' AND UPPER(LeadSubSource) NOT LIKE '%CONQUEST%' AND UPPER(LeadSubSource) NOT LIKE '%ADAPTIVE%' THEN 'Email'
		
        WHEN ( (UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%GANNETT%' AND SourceGroup LIKE '%Print%') 
					OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%NEWSPAPER%' 
					OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%MAGAZINE%' 
					OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%JOURNAL%'
					OR (UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%KOHLER%' AND UPPER(SourceCode) LIKE  '%LOCAL%')					
						)
				
					THEN 'Newspapers/Magazines'
		
		WHEN UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%VALPAK%' THEN 'Shared Mail'
												  
		WHEN UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%NATIVE ADS%'  THEN 'Native'
		
		/* -- HSI Don't have Retail & Canvass
		WHEN UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%MALL%' 
					OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE 'SAM%'  
					OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%HOME DEPOT%'
					OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%BRANDSMART%'
					OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%IME- BJs%'
					THEN 'Retail'
					
					
		WHEN UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%CANVAS%' AND UPPER(LeadSubSource) NOT LIKE 'JB CANVASS%'  THEN 'Canvass'
		
					*/
		
		WHEN UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%WALK-IN%'  OR (UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%REFERRAL%' AND UPPER(LeadSubSource) NOT LIKE '%ORGANIC%' AND UPPER(LeadSubSource) NOT LIKE '%KOHLER%') THEN 'Consumer Referral'
		
		WHEN UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%LAVIN%'  THEN 'Branded Partner'
		
		-- Donet have Out Of Home
		--WHEN UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%YARD%' THEN 'Out of Home'
		
        ELSE NULL

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ MAC---------

WITH T_MAC AS 
(


SELECT 
	Division,
    LeadSubSourceID,
    SourceGroup,
    SourceCode,
    LeadSubSource,
    TX_SourceCode,
    CASE 
		WHEN ( UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%RADIO%' 	OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '% FM' OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '% FM %' OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE 'FM %' OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%-FM %' OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '% FM-%'
													OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '% AM' OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '% AM %' OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE 'AM %' OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%-AM %' OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '% AM-%'
													OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE 'iHeart%' 
													OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%ESPN%'
													)	AND UPPER(LeadSubSource) NOT LIKE '%NEWS%' AND UPPER(LeadSubSource) NOT LIKE '%TOUR%' THEN 'Broadcast Radio'
		
		WHEN (UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE 'TV' OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '% TV' OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '% TV %' OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE 'TV %' OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%TELEVISION%' 
											  OR (UPPER(SourceCode) LIKE '%TELEVISION%'
													AND 
														(
																UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE 'CABLE %' 
															OR  UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE 'CEDAR %'
															OR  UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE 'DES %'
															OR  UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE 'GB %'
															OR  UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE 'LCEAU %'
															OR  UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE 'MAD %'
															OR  UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE 'MADISON %'
															OR  UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE 'MANK %'
															OR  UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE 'MKE %'
															OR  UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE 'MN %'
															OR  UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE 'MN-%'
															OR  UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE 'PER %'
															OR  UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE 'QUAD %'
															OR  UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE 'ROCH %'
															OR  UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE 'ROCK %'
															OR  UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE 'WAU %'
															
															)
													)
													
									) AND UPPER(LeadSubSource) NOT LIKE '%BCI-WIT%' THEN 'Broadcast TV'
									
									
		
		WHEN (	UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%DIRECT MAIL%' OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%MAILER%' OR  UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE  '%MAY - BATH%')
									AND (UPPER(LeadSubSource) NOT LIKE '%VELPAK%' AND UPPER(LeadSubSource) NOT LIKE '%VEL PAK%' AND UPPER(LeadSubSource)  NOT LIKE '%DIRECT MAIL - RENUITY%') THEN 'Direct Mail'
        
		
		WHEN UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%FACEBOOK%'
						OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%META%'
						OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%PINTEREST%'
						OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%INSTAGRAM%'
						OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%BING – RENUITY%'						
						THEN 'Paid Social'
						
						
        WHEN UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%YELP%' THEN 'Directories'
		
		WHEN UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%YOUTUBE%' THEN 'YouTube'  
		
        WHEN (UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%GOOGLE%' 
						--OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%YOUTUBE%' 
						OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%YAHOO%' 
						OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%PPC%' 
						OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%PERFORMANCE MAX%' 
						OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%PAID SEARCH%'
						) 
						AND (UPPER(LeadSubSource) NOT LIKE '%ORGANIC%' AND UPPER(LeadSubSource) NOT LIKE '%LOCAL%' AND UPPER(LeadSubSource) NOT LIKE '%TV%'  ) THEN 'Paid Search'
						
						
        WHEN (UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%ORGANIC%' OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%SEO%' )  
						AND UPPER(LeadSubSource) NOT LIKE '%CUSTOMER REFERRAL%' 
						AND UPPER(LeadSubSource) NOT LIKE '%BCI Organic%'
						AND UPPER(LeadSubSource) NOT LIKE '%TV%'
						THEN 'Organic/SEO'
		
		WHEN UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%EMAIL%' AND UPPER(LeadSubSource) NOT LIKE '%CONQUEST%' AND UPPER(LeadSubSource) NOT LIKE '%ADAPTIVE%' THEN 'Email'
		
        WHEN ( (UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%GANNETT%' AND SourceGroup LIKE '%Print%') 
					OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%NEWSPAPER%' 
					OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%MAGAZINE%' 
					OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%JOURNAL%'			
					OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE 'WPA %'
						)
					THEN 'Newspapers/Magazines'
		
		WHEN UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%VALPAK%' THEN 'Shared Mail'
												  
		WHEN UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%NATIVE ADS%'  THEN 'Native'
		
		WHEN UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%MALL%' 
					OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE 'SAM%'  
					OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%HOME DEPOT%'
					OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE 'MHR%'
					OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%WALMART%'
					OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE 'WI-%'
					THEN 'Retail'
					
					
		WHEN UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%CANVAS%' AND UPPER(LeadSubSource) NOT LIKE 'JB CANVASS%'  THEN 'Canvass'
		
					
		-- No Definite Pattern MAC
		--WHEN (UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%REFERRAL%' AND UPPER(LeadSubSource) NOT LIKE '%ORGANIC%' AND UPPER(LeadSubSource) NOT LIKE '%KOHLER%') THEN 'Consumer Referral'
		
		-- No Definite Pattern MAC
		--WHEN UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%LAVIN%' OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%DOLEAD%'   THEN 'Branded Partner'
		
		WHEN UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%YARD%' THEN 'Out of Home'
		
        ELSE NULL 
    END AS CAL_SourceCode
FROM [EDW].[DIM_MKTNG_SUB_SOURCE_MAPPING]
WHERE Division = 'MAC' AND MAPPINGIND='UNMAP'
)
Update [EDW].[DIM_MKTNG_SUB_SOURCE_MAPPING] set 
       TX_Channel        		= RF.TX_Channel
       ,TX_Sourcegroup   		= RF.TX_Sourcegroup
       ,TX_SourceCode    		= RF.TX_SourceCode
	   ,ACU_AccountCode         = RF.ACU_AccountCode
	   ,ACU_MarketingAccountID  = RF.ACU_MarketingAccountID
	   ,ACU_MarketingAccount    = RF.ACU_MarketingAccount
       ,MappingInd       		= (CASE WHEN (T.TX_SourceCode IS NOT NULL AND ( T.TX_Channel != RF.TX_Channel OR T.TX_Sourcegroup != RF.TX_Sourcegroup OR T.TX_SourceCode != RF.TX_SourceCode)) THEN 'REMAP_FUZZ' ELSE 'MAP_FUZZ' END)
       ,LastUpdatedTS    		= Getdate()
from [EDW].[DIM_MKTNG_SUB_SOURCE_MAPPING] T
Join T_MAC SM  on T.Division=SM.Division and T.LeadSubSourceID=SM.LeadSubSourceID
Left Join (SELECT DISTINCT TX_SOURCEGROUP,TX_SOURCECODE,TX_CHANNEL,ACU_AccountCode,ACU_MarketingAccountID,ACU_MarketingAccount FROM RDM.REF_MKTNG_SOURCE_GROUP)  RF on SM.CAL_Sourcecode= RF.TX_SourceCode

									OR UPPER(SourceCode) LIKE '%Ron Sherman TV%'

		WHEN UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%YARD%' THEN 'Out of Home'

						AND UPPER(LeadSubSource) NOT LIKE '%BCI Organic%'
						AND UPPER(LeadSubSource) NOT LIKE '%TV%'
						THEN 'Organic/SEO'
		
		WHEN UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%EMAIL%' AND UPPER(LeadSubSource) NOT LIKE '%CONQUEST%' AND UPPER(LeadSubSource) NOT LIKE '%ADAPTIVE%' THEN 'Email'
		
        WHEN UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%NEWSPAPER%' 
					OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%MAGAZINE%' 
					OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%JOURNAL%'			
					OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE 'WPA %'
					OR (SourceCode ='Gannett' AND (UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE 'SC %' OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE 'NC %') )
					OR (SourceCode ='Magazine'  AND UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE 'Clipper %' )
					THEN 'Newspapers/Magazines'
		
		WHEN UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%VALPAK%' OR  UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE 'MSPARK%' THEN 'Shared Mail'
												  
		WHEN UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%NATIVE ADS%'  THEN 'Native'
		
		WHEN  UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE 'SAM%'  
					OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%HOME DEPOT%'
					OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%BJ%'
					THEN 'Retail'
					
					
		WHEN UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%CANVAS%' AND UPPER(LeadSubSource) NOT LIKE 'JB CANVASS%'  THEN 'Canvass'
		
					
		-- No Definite Pattern MAC
		--WHEN (UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%REFERRAL%' AND UPPER(LeadSubSource) NOT LIKE '%ORGANIC%' AND UPPER(LeadSubSource) NOT LIKE '%KOHLER%') THEN 'Consumer Referral'
		
		-- No Definite Pattern MAC
		--WHEN UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%LAVIN%' OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%DOLEAD%'   THEN 'Branded Partner'
		
		WHEN UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%YARD%' THEN 'Out of Home'
		
        ELSE NULL 
    END AS CAL_SourceCode

FROM [EDW].[DIM_MKTNG_SUB_SOURCE_MAPPING]
WHERE Division = 'PHI' AND MAPPINGIND='UNMAP'

)

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ RTW---------

WITH T_RTW AS 
(


SELECT 
	Division,
    LeadSubSourceID,
    SourceGroup,
    SourceCode,
    LeadSubSource,
    TX_SourceCode,
    CASE 
		WHEN ( UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%RADIO%' 	OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '% FM' OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '% FM %' OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE 'FM %' OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%-FM %' OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '% FM-%'
													OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '% AM' OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '% AM %' OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE 'AM %' OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%-AM %' OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '% AM-%'
													OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE 'iHeart%' 
													OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%ESPN%'

											  ) THEN 'Broadcast TV'
									
									
		
		WHEN (	UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%DIRECT MAIL%' OR (UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%GANNETT%' AND   SourceCode LIKE '%Direct Mail%' ) )
									THEN 'Direct Mail'
        
		
		WHEN UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%FACEBOOK%' 
						OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%META%'
						OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%PINTEREST%'
						OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%INSTAGRAM%'
						THEN 'Paid Social'
						
						
        WHEN UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%YELP%' THEN 'Directories'
		
		WHEN UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%YOUTUBE%' THEN 'YouTube' 
		
        WHEN (UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%GOOGLE%' 
						--OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%YOUTUBE%' 
						OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%YAHOO%' 
						OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%PPC%' 
						OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%PERFORMANCE MAX%' 
						OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%PAID SEARCH%'
						OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%BING – RENUITY%'
						) 
						THEN 'Paid Search'
						
						
        WHEN (UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%ORGANIC%' OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%SEO%' )  
						AND UPPER(LeadSubSource) NOT LIKE '%CUSTOMER REFERRAL%' 
						AND UPPER(LeadSubSource) NOT LIKE '%BCI Organic%'
						AND UPPER(LeadSubSource) NOT LIKE '%TV%'
						THEN 'Organic/SEO'
		
		WHEN UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%EMAIL%' AND UPPER(LeadSubSource) NOT LIKE '%CONQUEST%' AND UPPER(LeadSubSource) NOT LIKE '%ADAPTIVE%' THEN 'Email'
		
        WHEN ( (UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%GANNETT%' AND SourceGroup LIKE '%Print%') 
					OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%NEWSPAPER%' 
					OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%MAGAZINE%' 
					OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%JOURNAL%'			
					OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE 'WPA %'
						)
					THEN 'Newspapers/Magazines'
		
		WHEN UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%VALPAK%' THEN 'Shared Mail'
												  
		WHEN UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%NATIVE ADS%'  THEN 'Native'
		
		
		/*-- Not existing in RTW
		WHEN UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%MALL%' 
					OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE 'SAM%'  
					OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%HOME DEPOT%'
					THEN 'Retail'
					*/
					
					
		WHEN UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%CANVAS%' AND UPPER(LeadSubSource) NOT LIKE 'JB CANVASS%'  THEN 'Canvass'
		
					
		-- No Definite Pattern MAC
		--WHEN (UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%REFERRAL%' AND UPPER(LeadSubSource) NOT LIKE '%ORGANIC%' AND UPPER(LeadSubSource) NOT LIKE '%KOHLER%') THEN 'Consumer Referral'
		
		-- No Definite Pattern MAC
		--WHEN UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%LAVIN%' OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%DOLEAD%'   THEN 'Branded Partner'
		
		WHEN UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%YARD%' THEN 'Out of Home'
		
        ELSE NULL 
    END AS CAL_SourceCode


FROM [EDW].[DIM_MKTNG_SUB_SOURCE_MAPPING]
WHERE Division = 'RTW' AND MAPPINGIND='UNMAP'

)
Update [EDW].[DIM_MKTNG_SUB_SOURCE_MAPPING] set

		WHEN UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%MALL%'

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ CTA---------

WITH T_CTA AS 
(



SELECT 
	Division,
    LeadSubSourceID,
    SourceGroup,
    SourceCode,
    LeadSubSource,
    TX_SourceCode,
    CASE 
		WHEN ( UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%RADIO%' 	OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '% FM' OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '% FM %' OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE 'FM %' OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%-FM %' OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '% FM-%'
												OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '% AM' OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '% AM %' OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE 'AM %' OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%-AM %' OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '% AM-%'
													OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE 'iHeart%' 
													OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%ESPN%'
													OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%WMAL%' OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%Radio%' OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%WBAL%' OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%WTOP%'
													OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%WIHT%'
													)	AND UPPER(LeadSubSource) NOT LIKE '%NEWS%' AND UPPER(LeadSubSource) NOT LIKE '%TOUR%'  THEN 'Broadcast Radio'
		-- BroadCast is not a part of CTA as of now
		--WHEN (UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%TV%' OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%TELEVISION%' 
		--											OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE 'PROMEDIA%'
		--											OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%RSR%'	
		--											OR (UPPER(SourceCode) LIKE '%RON SHERMAN%')
													
		--											) AND UPPER(LeadSubSource) NOT LIKE '%BCI-WIT%' THEN 'Broadcast TV'
		
		WHEN (	UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%DIRECT MAIL%' OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%MAILER%')
									AND (UPPER(LeadSubSource) NOT LIKE '%VELPAK%' AND UPPER(LeadSubSource) NOT LIKE '%VEL PAK%' AND UPPER(LeadSubSource)  NOT LIKE '%DIRECT MAIL - RENUITY%') THEN 'Direct Mail'
        
		
		WHEN UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%FACEBOOK%'
						OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%META%'
						OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%PINTEREST%' THEN 'Paid Social'
						
						
        WHEN UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%YELP%' THEN 'Directories'
		
		WHEN UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%YOUTUBE%' THEN 'YouTube' 
		
        WHEN (UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%GOOGLE%' 
						--OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%YOUTUBE%' 
						OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%YAHOO%' 
						OR (UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%PPC%' AND SourceCode NOT LIKE '%Internet%')-- Causing overwrite with Organic/SEO
						OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%PERFORMANCE MAX%' 
						OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%PAID SEARCH%'
						OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%BING – RENUITY%'
						-- new '%%' 
						OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%BING%'
						OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%AdWords%'
						--OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%GDN PPC%'
						OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%Renuity - Display%'
						) 
						AND (UPPER(LeadSubSource) NOT LIKE '%ORGANIC%' AND UPPER(LeadSubSource) NOT LIKE '%LOCAL%' AND UPPER(LeadSubSource) NOT LIKE '%TV%'  ) THEN 'Paid Search'
						
						
        WHEN (UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%ORGANIC%' OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%SEO%' ) AND UPPER(LeadSubSource) NOT LIKE '%CUSTOMER REFERRAL%' THEN 'Organic/SEO'
		
		--WHEN UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%EMAIL%' AND UPPER(LeadSubSource) NOT LIKE '%CONQUEST%' AND UPPER(LeadSubSource) NOT LIKE '%ADAPTIVE%' THEN 'Email'
		
        WHEN ( (UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%GANNETT%' AND SourceGroup LIKE '%Print%') OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%NEWSPAPER%' OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%MAGAZINE%' OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%JOURNAL%' ) THEN 'Newspapers/Magazines'
		
		--WHEN UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%VALPAK%' OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%VAL PAK%' 
		--										  OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%REDPLUM%' 
		--										  OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%RSVP%'
		--										  OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%REDPLUM%'
		--										  THEN 'Shared Mail'
												  
		WHEN UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%NATIVE ADS%'  THEN 'Native'
		
		--WHEN UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%MALL%' 
		--			OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE 'SAM%'  
		--			OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%HOME DEPOT%'
		--			OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%BRANDSMART%'
		--			OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%IME- BJs%'
		--			THEN 'Retail'
					
		WHEN UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%CANVAS%' AND (UPPER(LeadSubSource) NOT LIKE '%JB CANVAS%' AND UPPER(LeadSubSource) NOT LIKE '%DP CANVASS%')  THEN 'Canvass'
		
		WHEN UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%WALK-IN%'  OR (UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%CUSTOMER REFERRAL%' AND UPPER(LeadSubSource) NOT LIKE '%ORGANIC%') THEN 'Consumer Referral'
		
		WHEN UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%LAVIN MEDIA%' OR UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%SOCIAL BLUE%'   THEN 'Branded Partner'
		
		WHEN UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%YARD%' THEN 'Out of Home'

		--WHEN UPPER(LeadSubSource) LIKE '%DP Canvass%' THEN 'Agents Referral'
		
        ELSE NULL 
    END AS CAL_SourceCode 

FROM [EDW].[DIM_MKTNG_SUB_SOURCE_MAPPING]
WHERE Division = 'CTA' AND MAPPINGIND='UNMAP'

       ,MappingInd       		= (CASE WHEN (T.TX_SourceCode IS NOT NULL AND ( T.TX_Channel != RF.TX_Channel OR T.TX_Sourcegroup != RF.TX_Sourcegroup OR T.TX_SourceCode != RF.TX_SourceCode)) THEN 'REMAP_FUZZ' ELSE 'MAP_FUZZ' END)

scripts.text:
Update EDW.DIM_MKTNG_SUB_SOURCE_MAPPING 
SET EntryDate=T2.EntryDate
From
EDW.DIM_MKTNG_SUB_SOURCE_MAPPING T1 Join 
(
	select 
	ss.Division,
	ss.LeadSubSourceID,
	ss.EntryDate
	from 
		( select 
		  a.division,
		  a.leadsubsourceid,
		  max(b.entrydate) as entrydate
		  from edw.dim_lead_sub_source a
		  join edw.fact_lead b on a.leadsubsourceid = b.leadsubsourceid
		  group by  a.division,
				  a.leadsubsourceid
		) ss
	where entrydate>='2022-01-01'
) T2 
 On T1.division=T2.division and T1.leadsubsourceid=T2.leadsubsourceid
 Where  T1.division is NOT NULL and T1.leadsubsourceid is NOT NULL

WITH M1 AS 
(
		SELECT 
		src.LeadSubSourceID,
		src.SourceGroup AS SourceGroup_SRC,
		src.sourcecode AS sourcecode_SRC,
		src.LeadSubSource AS LeadSubSource_SRC,
		sm.SourceGroup AS SourceGroup_TGT,
		sm.sourcecode AS sourcecode_TGT,
		sm.LeadSubSource AS LeadSubSource_TGT,
		'UNMAP' AS MappingInd
		FROM 
		(
		select 
		ss.Division,
		sg.LeadSourceGroupID,
		s.LeadSourceID,
		ss.LeadSubSourceID,
		sg.SourceGroup,
		ss.SourceCode,
		ss.LeadSubSource,
		ss.Active,
		ss.EntryDate,
		'UNMAP' as MappingInd,
		getdate() as CreatedTS,
		getdate() as LastUpdatedTS
		from 
		( select 
		a.division,
		a.leadsubsourceid,
		a.leadsourceid,
		a.sourcecode,
		a.leadsubsource,
		a.active,
		max(b.entrydate) as entrydate
			from edw.dim_lead_sub_source a
			join edw.fact_lead b on a.leadsubsourceid = b.leadsubsourceid
			group by  a.division,
					a.leadsubsourceid,
					a.leadsourceid,
					a.sourcecode,
					a.leadsubsource,
					a.active) ss
					left join edw.dim_lead_source s on s.leadsourceid=ss.leadsourceid
					left join edw.dim_lead_source_group sg on s.sourcegroupid=sg.leadsourcegroupid
					where entrydate>='2022-01-01'
					) src join [edw].[dim_mktng_sub_source_mapping]  sm 
					on src.division=sm.division 
					and src.leadsubsourceid=sm.leadsubsourceid
		WHERE ((sm.SourceGroup!=src.SourceGroup) OR (sm.sourcecode != src.sourcecode) OR (sm.LeadSubSource != src.LeadSubSource))
		AND sm.MappingInd NOT IN ('HIST','FILE_OVERRIDE','UNMAP')-- removed the filter to update the source 1,2,3 values for all records if its updated--revoked
		
		
		)

UPDATE T1 
SET T1.SourceGroup  = M1.SourceGroup_SRC
,T1.SourceCode		= M1.Sourcecode_SRC
,T1.LeadSubSource   = M1.LeadSubSource_SRC
,T1.MappingInd	    = M1.MappingInd
,T1.LastUpdatedTS	= GETDATE()
 FROM M1 JOIN  [edw].[dim_mktng_sub_source_mapping] T1
 ON T1.leadsubsourceid = M1.leadsubsourceid

WITH MX AS 
(

SELECT * FROM 
	
	(
		SELECT 
			LeadSubsourceID 	, 
			Division			,
			Sourcegroup			,
			SourceCode			, 
			Leadsubsource		,
			TX_channel			, 
			TX_sourcegroup		,
			TX_sourceCode		,
			CASE 
			WHEN TX_SOURCECODE='Retail' THEN
				(
					CASE 
						WHEN SOURCECODE IN ('Home Depot','Home Depot Bath','SWR_HD DLS','SWR-Home Depot') OR SOURCECODE LIKE 'HD %' 				THEN 'Home Depot'
						WHEN SOURCECODE IN ('Malls/Walmart','Walmart','WALMART DLS') 		 														THEN 'MHR - Walmart'
						WHEN SOURCECODE IN ('BJs','BJs Clubs','WALMART DLS','IME - BJs Onl') 														THEN  'BJs'
						WHEN UPPER(SOURCECODE) LIKE 'SAMS %' OR UPPER(SOURCECODE) LIKE 'IME - SAMS%' OR UPPER(SOURCECODE)='SWR-SAMS CLUB (ALL)' 	THEN 'Sams Club'
						WHEN SOURCECODE IN ('Costco') 																								THEN 'Costco'
						WHEN SOURCECODE IN ('HEB Austin','HEB Houston') 																			THEN 'HEB'
					END
					)
			
			WHEN TX_SOURCECODE='Manufacturer' THEN 
				(	
					CASE WHEN SourceCode IN ('KOHLER','KOHLER SHOWER','KOHLER SHOWERS') 		THEN 'Kohler'
						WHEN SourceCode IN ('Liners Direct') 									THEN 'Jacuzzi'
						WHEN SourceCode IN ('BCI') 												THEN 'BCI'
					END
					)
					
			WHEN TX_SOURCECODE='Agents Referral' THEN 
				(	
					CASE WHEN SOURCECODE IN ('Home Works HES','Home Works','Home Works CC') 	THEN 'Home Works'
						WHEN SOURCECODE IN ('Revise Energy') 									THEN 'Revise'
						WHEN SOURCECODE IN ('RemoPro') 											THEN 'RemoPro'
						WHEN SOURCECODE IN ('Weathervane') 										THEN 'Weathervane'
					END
					)
			
			WHEN TX_SOURCECODE='Broadcast TV' THEN 
				(	
					CASE WHEN SOURCECODE IN ('Ron Sherman') 									THEN 'Ron Sherman'
					END
					)
					
			WHEN TX_SOURCECODE='NewspaperGANNET' THEN 
				(	
					CASE WHEN SOURCECODE IN ('Gannett') 										THEN 'Gannett'
					END
					)
				
			WHEN DIVISION='SWR' 				THEN 
				(
					CASE WHEN SOURCEGROUP ='SWR-Sams Club (ALL)' 								THEN	'Sams Club'
						WHEN SOURCEGROUP ='SWR-Home Depot' 										THEN 	'Home Depot' 
					END
					)
											
			END AS Vendor_N
			
			FROM EDW.DIM_MKTNG_SUB_SOURCE_MAPPING 
			WHERE MappingInd<>'UNMAP'
			AND Vendor IS NULL
			
			) M1
			
	WHERE Vendor_N IS NOT NULL
	
	)



UPDATE EDW.DIM_MKTNG_SUB_SOURCE_MAPPING 
SET Vendor=MX.Vendor_N
FROM
EDW.DIM_MKTNG_SUB_SOURCE_MAPPING T1 JOIN MX
ON T1.LeadSubsourceID = MX.LeadSubsourceID

With LP_SourceUpdates as 
(
Select  SS.Division,SS.LeadSubsourceID, SG.SourceGroup,SS.SourceCode,SS.LeadSubsource
--M.TX_Channel,M.TX_SourceGroup,M.TX_sourceCode
from EDW.DIM_Lead_Sub_SOURCE SS  
Left Join EDW.DIM_Lead_source S on SS.LeadSourceID=S.LeadSourceID
Left join EDW.DIM_Lead_Source_Group SG on S.SourceGroupId=SG.LeadSourceGroupID
--Left join EDW.DIM_MKTNG_Sub_Source_mapping M on SS.LeadsubsourceID=M.LeadsubsourceID
)

from EDW.DIM_MKTNG_Sub_Source_mapping M   join LP_SourceUpdates L on M.LeadsubsourceId=L.LeadsubsourceId
where 1=1--M.Leadsubsource<>L.Leadsubsource
